title: tium scopulorum
intro: Tium scopulorum, also known as the mountain tansy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects, and it has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Tium scopulorum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits.
